description: WASM Plugin capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, sandbox lifecycle, Host ABI execution gate, module integrity gate, remote signature verification gate preview, approval decision/writeback plan previews, pack-local approval queue writeback persistence, installer continuation handoff planning, installer download cache writeback, cached package signature verification writeback, verified package inspection writeback, installer registration handoff planning, permission plans, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose WASM plugin registry, load/unload lifecycle, dry-run sandbox execution, Host ABI plan/execution-gate previews, remote signature verification gate previews, approval gate/decision/writeback plan previews, pack-local approval queue writeback persistence, installer continuation handoff planning, installer download cache writeback, cached package signature verification writeback, verified package inspection writeback, installer registration handoff planning, and JSON evidence export as a high-risk optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep WASM method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Keep privileged Host ABI requests blocked during real execution until host_abi_enforcement_ready becomes true.
Keep local WASM module bytes matched to registered SHA-256 metadata before sandbox execution.

Keep remote signed package installs blocked behind deterministic signature_verification, approval decision, pack-local approval queue writeback persistence, installer continuation handoff planning, installer download cache writeback, cached package signature verification writeback, verified package inspection writeback, and installer registration handoff planning until installer write-back and explicit plugin registration become true.
Let external projects import yunque-client/wasm-plugin only when the WASM Plugin pack is installed and enabled.
